data.title: Samsara Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies List for Manufacturing and Logistics
data.description: In San Francisco, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT), a leading innovator in the Connected Operations® Platform, has recently been recognized for its extraordinary influence by being included in TIME’s list of the 100 Most Influential Companies of 2026 in the Manufacturing & Logistics sector. This prestigious list acknowledges companies globally for their significant impact, innovation, ambition, and influence. Samsara's inclusion in this category highlights its dedication to revolutionizing the industry.

data.title: Company behind Ayrton Senna's global brand reports eightfold growth, expands internationally
data.description: Senna Brands is expanding its focus from just licensing to establish a worldwide platform that includes partnerships, experiences, and owned assets. This shift is occurring over thirty years after the passing of Ayrton Senna, the three-time Formula One champion. The company aims to capitalize on the enduring popularity of Senna's legacy to fuel international business growth. The development was announced in São Paulo on April 29, 2026.
DBS GROUP 1Q NET INCOME S$2.93B, EST. S$2.88B

data.title: MGM China Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: MGM China Holdings Limited reported a 10% increase in revenue year-on-year, with a significant 19% rise in Daily Mass Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) compared to the previous year. This surge led to reaching a new high for the company. The announcement was made in Hong Kong on April 29, 2026. MGM China, listed under SEHK Stock Code: 2282, shared the unaudited financial data indicating the positive growth in its operations.

data.title: FIBRA Prologis Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: In Mexico City on April 29, 2026, FIBRA Prologis (BMV:FIBRAPL 14), a prominent owner and manager of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, announced its first quarter 2026 results. Key points include a notable 59.6 percent net effective rent on rollover during the quarter.

data.title: Bitcoin's rally halted as Fed maintains interest rates, pointing to ‘uncertainty’ in Middle East. BTC falls below $75k after release of FOMC minutes. Fed raises concerns about inflation and Iran conflict.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin fell below $75,000 following the release of the FOMC minutes, which revealed that the US Federal Reserve decided to maintain interest rates. The central bank also showed slight worries about inflation rates and the ongoing conflict in Iran.

GENERAL MOTORS' US MANUFACTURING INVESTMENTS HAVE CLIMBED TO OVER $6 BILLION, INCLUDING A COMBINED $830 MILLION TO BOLSTER THREE KEY PROPULSION SITES ACROSS ITS US FOOTPRINT — NAMELY ROMULUS PROPULSION SYSTEMS, TOLEDO PROPULSION SYSTEMS, AND SAGINAW METAL CASTING OPERATIONS IN MICHIGAN.

data.title: Suzano Sells 12.7 Million Tonnes of Pulp for the First Time in Its History
data.description: In SÃO PAULO, Suzano (B3: SUZB3 | NYSE: SUZ), the leading global pulp producer, has reported its first quarter of 2026 (1Q26) results, revealing a new milestone in pulp sales. In the period from April 2025 to March 2026, Suzano achieved a record-breaking figure of 12.7 million tonnes of pulp sold, marking the highest volume in the company's history. Additionally, during the same timeframe, Suzano also sold 1.7 million tonnes of paper, encompassing various segments including packaging, printing and writing, specialty, and tissue.

FONTERRA CO-OPERATIVE GROUP — GLOBAL DAIRY UPDATE APRIL 2026: AUSTRALIA'S MARCH MILK COLLECTIONS ROSE 7.0% (UP 3.8% SEASON-TO-DATE), WHILE NEW ZEALAND'S MARCH MILK COLLECTIONS CLIMBED 9.6% (UP 3.7% SEASON-TO-DATE).

data.title: EA Automatic Announces Next Generation Intelligent Trading Solutions Built for Performance, Precision, and Long-Term Growth
data.description: Revolutionizing algorithmic trading with customized strategies, AI-powered platforms, and skilled human supervision. The innovation is set in London on April 29, 2026. In the rapidly changing financial realm, where market dynamics change within seconds and opportunities last mere milliseconds...

data.title: Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund, Inc. (RQI) Notification of Sources of Distribution Under Section 19(a)
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in New York, a press release was issued for shareholders of Cohen & Steers Quality Income Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RQI), informing them about the upcoming distribution scheduled for April 30, 2026. The release includes details about the sources of the distribution and cumulative distributions paid during the fiscal period. Shareholders of the Fund are advised to take note of this information.
CHAMPION IRON REPORTS ITS FY2026 FOURTH QUARTER PRODUCTION AND SALES

data.title: Bird-X Unveils Two Game-Changing Handheld Lasers That Send Pest Birds Fleeing on Sight
data.description: Bird-X, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of professional bird control solutions in the United States, has introduced the HH-100 and HH-400 Class 3B Platforms, offering instant and long-range bird dispersal capabilities. The company has also initiated certification programs for LST and LSO concurrently. This announcement was made on April 29, 2026, in Chicago. The HH-100 and HH-400 platforms are designed to efficiently address bird-related issues and are poised to make a significant impact in the market.

data.title: Twenty One Capital Outlines Operating Plans to Build the Bitcoin Company
data.description: Twenty One Capital, Inc. (“Twenty One”), a Bitcoin-focused firm based in Austin, Texas, revealed its plan to acquire Strike, a top Bitcoin financial services company, and Elektron, a global Bitcoin mining platform. By consolidating these entities, Twenty One aims to integrate Bitcoin treasury, mining, financial services, and capital markets. This move is part of their strategic approach that involves mergers and acquisitions to enhance their operations within the Bitcoin sector.

data.title: National E&S Leaders Convene as U.S. Market Surpasses $100 Billion Amid Rising Risk Complexity
data.description: Today in Anaheim, over 100 leaders in regulatory, legal, and industry sectors of the U.S. surplus lines market came together for the Surplus Lines Law Group meeting hosted by the Surplus Line Association of California. This gathering attracted a diverse group of professionals collaborating on various aspects of the market, showcasing the importance of such events in facilitating discussions and networking opportunities within the industry.

data.title: SPX Cooling Tech Unveils the Marley® OlympusMAX™ Fluid Cooler
data.description: SPX Cooling Tech, LLC unveiled the Marley® OlympusMAX™ Fluid Cooler in Overland Park, Kansas on April 29, 2026. This cutting-edge cooler offers maximum capacity and trusted performance for critical facilities. It ensures unmatched efficiency and design flexibility, setting new standards in cooling technology.
BRAZIL SENATE FLOOR REJECTS LULA'S PICK TO SUPREME COURT

data.title: Google and Microsoft exceed Q1 estimates, Google Cloud up 63% and Microsoft AI hits $37 billion run rate.
data.description: Both Alphabet and Microsoft exceeded Q1 expectations in impressive quarterly earnings reports. Google Cloud witnessed a remarkable 63% increase, while Microsoft's AI business achieved a staggering $37 billion run rate.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Set More Record Highs; Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Alphabet Are Big Winners
data.description: Stock market futures for the Dow Jones showed positive trends on Monday as both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 reached new record highs. Companies such as Micron, Sandisk, Nvidia, and Alphabet were notable gainers. The success of these companies contributed to the overall positive performance of the market, with investors showing optimism for future growth. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 indexes in particular saw significant gains, reflecting the strong performance of the tech and semiconductor sectors. Investors closely monitored the progress of these companies, with many seeing potential for further growth in the near future.

data.title: RealOpen and TRON confirm $9.4 million in USDT for crypto real estate deals in joint Holiday Campaign. #RealEstate #CryptoTransaction
data.description: RealOpen, a prominent platform for purchasing real estate using cryptocurrency, recently revealed the successful completion of its joint "Fast Moves, Fast Payments" Holiday Campaign with TRON.
